# Riso Template Compatibility Matrix

This document provides a comprehensive compatibility reference for all Riso template options.
Use this guide to understand which combinations work together and make informed decisions.

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED: Do not edit manually. Run `uv run python scripts/generate_compatibility_matrix.py` -->

## Compatibility Matrix

### Backend Language Compatibility

| Language | Frameworks | Package Managers | Testing |
|----------|------------|------------------|---------|
| Python | FastAPI, Flask, Django | uv, poetry, conda | pytest, unittest |
| Rust | Axum, Actix, Rocket, Warp, Poem | cargo | cargo test |
| Node.js | Fastify, Express, NestJS, Koa, Hono | pnpm, npm, yarn | Jest, Vitest |
| Go | Gin, Fiber, Echo, Chi | go modules | go test |
| Java | Spring Boot, Quarkus, Micronaut | Maven, Gradle | JUnit, TestNG |

### Frontend Framework Compatibility

| Framework | Meta-Frameworks | State Management | Routing | Component Libraries |
|-----------|-----------------|------------------|---------|---------------------|
| React | Vite, Next.js, Remix, Gatsby | Zustand, Redux, MobX, Jotai | TanStack Router, React Router | shadcn/ui, MUI, Chakra UI, Mantine |
| Vue | Vite, Nuxt, Quasar, VitePress | Pinia, Vuex | Vue Router | Element Plus, Vuetify, Quasar |
| Svelte | SvelteKit, Vite | Svelte stores | SvelteKit routing | Skeleton UI, Carbon Components |

## Decision Trees

Use these decision trees to guide your configuration choices:

```mermaid
graph TD
    A[Start: Backend Language Selection] --> B{Need API?}
    B -->|Yes| C{Performance Critical?}
    B -->|No| Z[Skip backend selection]
    C -->|Yes| D{Type Safety?}
    C -->|No| E{Ecosystem Maturity?}
    D -->|Critical| F[Rust + Axum]
    D -->|Moderate| G[Go + Gin]
    E -->|Mature| H{Framework Preference?}
    E -->|Cutting Edge| I[Node.js + Fastify]
    H -->|Async| J[Python + FastAPI]
    H -->|Traditional| K[Python + Django]
    H -->|Lightweight| L[Python + Flask]
```
```mermaid
graph TD
    A[Start: Frontend Framework Selection] --> B{Need UI?}
    B -->|No| Z[frontend_framework: none]
    B -->|Yes| C{Project Type?}
    C -->|SPA| D{Team Preference?}
    C -->|Static Site| E[Consider Astro/Gatsby]
    C -->|Full-stack| F[Consider Next.js/Remix/SvelteKit]
    D -->|Most Popular| G[React + Vite]
    D -->|Progressive| H[Vue + Vite]
    D -->|Compiled/Fast| I[Svelte + SvelteKit]
    G --> J{State Management?}
    J -->|Simple| K[Zustand]
    J -->|Complex| L[Redux/MobX]
    G --> M{Component Library?}
    M -->|Unstyled| N[shadcn/ui + Radix]
    M -->|Material| O[MUI]
    M -->|Modern| P[Mantine/NextUI]
```
```mermaid
graph TD
    A[Start: Repository Structure] --> B{Project Scope?}
    B -->|Single Package| C[repository_structure: src-layout]
    B -->|Multiple Services| D{Language Mix?}
    D -->|Single Language| E[repository_structure: apps-packages]
    D -->|Multi-Language| F{Build Tool?}
    F -->|Modern JS/TS| G[Turborepo + apps-packages]
    F -->|Enterprise| H[Nx + apps-packages]
    F -->|Polyglot| I[Bazel + domain-driven]
    B -->|Microservices| J[repository_structure: multi-workspace]
```

## Alternative Recommendations

### Backend Alternatives

**FastAPI**: Consider Flask for simpler APIs, Django for CMS/admin needs

**Rust**: Consider Go for easier learning curve with good performance

**Node.js**: Consider Bun for even faster execution (experimental)

### Frontend Alternatives

**React**: Consider Preact for smaller bundle size, Solid for fine-grained reactivity

**Next.js**: Consider Remix for web standards focus, Astro for content sites

**Tailwind**: Consider UnoCSS for faster builds, Panda CSS for type-safe styles

### Tooling Alternatives

**Turborepo**: Consider Nx for more features, Moon for Rust-based speed

**Vite**: Consider Turbopack (Next.js), esbuild for maximum speed

**pnpm**: Consider Bun for all-in-one toolchain, npm for simplicity


## Best Practices

### Backend Selection

- Choose Python for data science/ML integrations
- Choose Rust for maximum performance and type safety
- Choose Node.js for real-time features and npm ecosystem
- Choose Go for operational simplicity and deployment ease

### Frontend Selection

- Start with Vite + React for most projects
- Use Next.js for SEO-critical sites or full-stack apps
- Choose Svelte for smaller bundle sizes
- Pair shadcn/ui with Tailwind for customizable components

### Repository Structure

- Use src-layout for single-package Python projects
- Use apps-packages for TypeScript monorepos
- Use domain-driven for complex business domains
- Avoid monorepo for simple single-service projects

### Testing Strategy

- Use pytest for Python, Vitest for TypeScript
- Add Playwright for critical user flows
- Enable coverage reporting in CI
- Run tests on matrix of Python/Node versions


## Incompatible Combinations

The following combinations are **not supported** and will fail validation:

### frontend_framework

- `frontend_framework=none` + `component_library` → Component libraries require a frontend framework
- `frontend_framework=none` + `css_framework` → CSS frameworks require a frontend framework
- `frontend_framework=none` + `icon_library` → Icon libraries require a frontend framework

### project_layout

- `project_layout=single-package` + `monorepo_tool` → Monorepo tools only apply to monorepo layouts

### backend_languages

- `backend_languages=[]` + `python_api_framework` → Python framework requires Python in backend_languages
- `backend_languages=[]` + `rust_web_framework` → Rust framework requires Rust in backend_languages
- `backend_languages=[]` + `node_api_framework` → Node framework requires Node in backend_languages

## Prompt Dependencies

The following prompts depend on other prompt values:

- **ai_tools** depends on: `copilot`
- **api_testing** depends on: `backend_languages`, `length`, `pytest`
- **async_support** depends on: `api_tracks`, `all`, `disabled`, `node`, `python`, `enabled`
- **backend_languages** depends on: `python`
- **build_tool** depends on: `vite`, `node`, `backend_languages`, `frontend_framework`
- **component_library** depends on: `shadcn`, `ui`, `react`, `frontend_framework`
- **containerization** depends on: `enabled`
- **css_framework** depends on: `tailwind`, `frontend_framework`
- **database_engine** depends on: `postgres`, `python`, `api_tracks`, `node`
- **docs_api_playground** depends on: `api_tracks`, `disabled`, `all`, `node`, `python`
- **docs_deploy_target** depends on: `docs_site`, `pages`, `github`
- **docs_interactive_features** depends on: `docs_site`, `disabled`
- **docs_quality_gates** depends on: `docs_site`, `enabled`
- **docs_search_provider** depends on: `local`, `docs_site`
- **docs_site** depends on: `shibuya`, `api_tracks`, `sphinx`, `node`, `fumadocs`, `python`, `web_app_engine`
- **docs_theme_mode** depends on: `docs_site`, `auto`
- **docs_versioning** depends on: `docs_site`, `disabled`
- **frontend_framework** depends on: `web_app_engine`, `react`
- **frontend_testing** depends on: `playwright`, `vitest`, `frontend_framework`
- **gh_cli** depends on: `enabled`
- **github_features** depends on: `ci_platform`, `actions`, `enabled`, `github`
- **go_web_framework** depends on: `go`, `backend_languages`, `gin`
- **graphql_api_module** depends on: `api_tracks`, `python`, `python`, `node`, `all`
- **icon_library** depends on: `lucide`, `frontend_framework`
- **ide_config** depends on: `cursor`, `vscode`
- **include_databases** depends on: `api_tracks`, `python`, `node`, `python`, `node`
- **java_framework** depends on: `boot`, `backend_languages`, `java`, `spring`
- **migration_tool** depends on: `alembic`, `database_engine`, `postgres`
- **monitoring_tools** depends on: `python`, `backend_languages`, `node`, `backend_languages`
- **monorepo_tool** depends on: `packages`, `apps`, `repository_structure`, `turborepo`
- **node_api_framework** depends on: `fastify`, `node`, `backend_languages`
- **node_package_manager** depends on: `api_tracks`, `pnpm`, `all`, `node`, `python`, `web_app_engine`
- **python_api_framework** depends on: `python`, `backend_languages`, `fastapi`
- **python_package_manager** depends on: `api_tracks`, `all`, `node`, `python`, `uv`
- **react_framework** depends on: `vite`, `react`, `frontend_framework`
- **react_routing** depends on: `nextjs`, `remix`, `framework`, `router`, `frontend_framework`, `tanstack`, `react_framework`, `react`
- **react_state_management** depends on: `zustand`, `react`, `frontend_framework`
- **repository_structure** depends on: `monorepo`, `project_layout`, `src`, `packages`, `layout`, `apps`
- **rust_web_framework** depends on: `axum`, `backend_languages`, `rust`
- **shell_type** depends on: `bash`
- **svelte_framework** depends on: `svelte`, `sveltekit`, `frontend_framework`
- **testing_framework** depends on: `api_tracks`, `pytest`, `all`, `node`, `python`
- **vue_framework** depends on: `vite`, `vue`, `frontend_framework`
- **vue_state_management** depends on: `pinia`, `vue`, `frontend_framework`
- **websocket_module** depends on: `api_tracks`, `python`, `python`, `node`, `all`
